message:
Update columns_multiline golden snapshot

The new output correctly shows proper line separation in multiline
column layouts, where previously text was incorrectly merged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-also multiline

+Second column
+also multiline
